# LiquidStack

**Category:** Liquid Cooling, Immersion Cooling, Rear-Door and Direct-to-Chip Cooling
**Website:** https://liquidstack.com/

## Headline
Advanced liquid cooling provider spanning immersion, direct-to-chip, and high-density AI/HPC thermal strategies.

## Overview
LiquidStack is highly relevant where buyers move beyond generic cooling talk and need advanced thermal options for dense AI and HPC environments. It strengthens the immersion and direct-to-chip branches of the taxonomy with a vendor that clearly speaks to those workloads.

## Key capabilities
- immersion cooling systems
- direct-to-chip cooling relevance
- high-density AI and HPC thermal strategy

## Best fit for
- buyers evaluating advanced liquid cooling paths
- AI and HPC infrastructure teams
- programs where rack density is forcing non-air approaches
